/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -ggdb -g CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/util/gen_bitmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector16.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/fileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/resource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/fastbit/array_t.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/utils/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gen_bitmap.dir/src/core/croaring/roaring.c.o -o gen_bitmap  src/core/combit/libcombit.a -latomic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0
